P01.summary: Completed the model-routing and local evidence foundation with additive Responses support. Verified by targeted unit tests, one live structured Responses extraction smoke, one live embedding smoke, and a fresh full `npm run verify` pass.
commands: backend/.venv/bin/python -m pytest backend/tests/unit/test_model_routing.py backend/tests/unit/test_llm_client.py backend/tests/unit/test_embedding_client_and_evidence_index.py -q -> 6 passed, 1 warning in 0.13s
PYTHONPATH=backend backend/.venv/bin/python live structured smoke via LLMClient.create_structured_response(...) -> model gpt-4o-mini-2024-07-18, verdict Strong demand is indicated in the market.
PYTHONPATH=backend backend/.venv/bin/python live embedding smoke via LocalEmbeddingClient.embed_text(...) -> 1536 dimensions, normalized norm 1.0
npm run verify -> frontend verify passed, vite build passed, backend pytest passed with 333 passed, 1 warning in 36.48s
compatibility_fixes: Preserved legacy `LLM_*` env settings while adding task-scoped OpenAI route helpers.
Kept `LLMClient.chat(...)` and `LLMClient.chat_json(...)` intact while adding Responses-based structured methods.
Decoupled router resolution from per-instance overrides so custom routers only need `resolve(task)`.

P02.summary: Completed structure-aware ingestion with deterministic source-unit provenance. Verified by targeted parser/text-processor/upload tests, one live ontology upload smoke that persisted `source_units.json`, and a fresh full `npm run verify` pass.
commands: PYTHONPATH=backend backend/.venv/bin/python live ontology upload smoke via Flask test client POST /api/graph/ontology/generate -> 200, success=True, project_id=proj_1e7b4a4fc199, unit_count=6, source_units exists=True
npm run verify -> frontend verify passed, vite build passed, backend pytest passed with 337 passed, 1 warning in 5.64s
compatibility_fixes: Added `ProjectManager` helpers for `source_units.json` as a minimal compatibility shim for later phases.
Preserved `FileParser.extract_text(...)` and existing upload/ontology flow while adding richer parser metadata.
Kept graph build compatible with pre-P02 projects by falling back to fixed-character splitting when `source_units.json` is absent.
